top.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again

top.title: Watch: Trump tells BBC Netanyahu did not defy him

top.title: Israel and Iran flare-up could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand

top.title: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
